name: Carrot-Apple Sauce Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup firmly packed light or dark brown sugar
Grated peel (no white attached) of 2 oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Lightly spray muffin tins with cooking spray containing flour.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cardamom.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the eggs, brown sugar, and vanilla, mixing well.
5. Stir in the vegetable oil, applesauce, carrots, raisins, and orange peel. Mix until just incorporated.
6. Add to the flour mixture and mix just until combined.
7. Pour into prepared muffin tins.
8. Bake for about 20 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out clean.
9. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then invert the pan to cool completely.
Makes 18 large or 36 small muffins
